parameters: -----------ここからは移動先でのイベントの最初----------
特例天気、BGSをけすっぽいのでこの後にBGSを再生
Heheh, thanks as always...! Alright, just line up and wait your turn.

Ugh... What have I done......! I need to gather money to leave the village with
Elly... I'm sorry, Elly...... But I just can't take it anymore...!
完了までウェイト = false

While waiting my turn, I felt the weight of my sin in my gut the whole time. I stood
there regretting that I'd given in to a moment of lust... I stood there for what felt
like an eternity.

...Ah, it's almost my turn now... ...Maybe I should just quit. I don't have time for
this kind of thing anyway......

Oh, \n[1], sorry to keep you waiting, but your turn's coming up soon. Lucky you, you're
about to get a taste of that girl's blowjob skills!
...Uh, um! Actually, I think I'll... you know......

Heheh...♡ That girl's fucking hot, so look forward to it! No matter how long your
dick is, she'll deepthroat the whole thing... She'll lick you all over with her
tongue, from the head to the shaft♡
Ugh...! I-Is that so... Ugh, ugh...

Oh! R-right...! No matter how good it feels, don't make any gross noises! If the
prostitute thinks you're disgusting, she won't come to the village anymore...
Um... So you're saying I should hold back my voice?

Yeah, yeah! That's it...! A good customer is someone who suppresses their voice as
much as possible... You... if you make any weird noises, I'll spread it all over the
village!
Wha!? P-please don't do that!? If Elly finds out I did something like this...!

Heheh... I'll think about it if you don't make a loud noise! ...Alright, your turn's
here! Enjoy your first blowjob!
完了までウェイト = true
チャットエンドしたらignore復活する
対象キャラ名 = ダリオ
対象キャラ名 = 村長
完了までウェイト = false
......No one's watching, right? Alright, let's go... hey!
Phew...! Oh, you guys are already here...

Sneaking through the woods off the beaten path, avoiding prying eyes... Ahead lay the
secret playground only we childhood friends knew. It was the perfect spot, hidden
from the adults' view.
skit pose マナ t child 1
skit pose エリィ t child 3
skit fadeIn エリィ f right 60
skit fadeIn マナ f left 60
\SE[default]Big brother, you finally came! Are you done with your training already?

Yeah, I finished today's portion. I was thinking I'd just do some light stretching
and take it easy for a while.
\SE[default]Ehehe, good work...! \n[1], I was here too, studying by reading my grimoire...!
Oh really? You were working hard too, Mana!

\SE[3]\SM[stamp]Ugh! Mana-chan, even though you're with me... You're so absorbed in your book, you
don't pay any attention to me at all! Because of that, I had no choice but to play
with that idiot...

The hell you say! I wouldn't play with you even if \n[1] was here! Playing with girls
isn't fun at all anyway!

\SE[2]Huh? That's because you're weak, isn't it!? Racing, hide-and-seek...! And stone
skipping, right...? And then, just now, fishing! You got totally crushed by me,
didn't you~!?

Guh!? D-dammit...! Elly, you... It's weird that you're even good at fishing when it's
your first time! You must've been lying about it being your first time! You cheater!
skit shake エリィ f 4 3 16 f easeOut

\SE[1]\COM[exc]Hmph, it really was my first time~! It's your fault for losing so easily to
someone younger! Nya nya, weakling~! Loser Dario~!

\SE[4]Huh? What... you wanna go with me? Do you know what happens if you raise a hand
against a delicate girl...? Do I have to teach your body a lesson from scratch again?
Tch! Y-you're on! I'm gonna beat the crap out of you this time for sure────
H-hey, hey! Both of you, calm down...!

\SE[8]Elly-chan, you shouldn't provoke him so much...! We have to play together nicely,
okay?
Tch! L-let go of me, \n[1]! ...F-fine, I get it!
\SE[8]Hmm... well, if Mana-chan says so. Fine, I'll forgive you this much...

So... You two, since we've become childhood friends by chance, we should treasure
this bond... huh?
What's wrong, Dario? Did I hurt you when I grabbed you just now?

...Nah, you. Somehow, you've gotten stronger without me noticing. Just a little while
ago you were such a scrawny brat.
Huh? R-really? Must be the result of daily training, ahaha...

\SE[5]\SM[pop2]Y-yeah! I think \n[1] has changed too! You've gotten way more robust since we first
met!

\SE[1]True... when I heard you were aiming to be an adventurer, I laughed and thought
there's no way big brother could do it... But if you keep this up, you might actually
make it.

...The rare flow of them praising me continued. Probably, that didn't sit well with
Dario. Maybe he wanted to get back at me for the teasing from Elly too...

...Even if you say you're gonna be adventurers... Putting aside \n[1] who's properly
training his body... Is Mana really okay with that?

'Cause it's true, right? You were just lazing around here all day today, reading
books and eating wild strawberries.

\SE[4]Hey, Dario! That's not right! For a mage like Mana-chan, reading grimoires is
important for getting stronger, I hear!

\SE[8]\SM[sexhara1].........The strawberries are... well... Mana-chan, when she's absorbed in a book,
she'll eat anything you give her... So it got fun, and I kinda ended up wanting to
feed her like that.........

\SE[11]\SM[attackf]Huh, feed me...? Elly-chan!? You're not mistaking me for a pet or something, are
you!?

Heh... Elly... It's 'cause you're feeding Mana like that every single day...! Look at
that wild strawberry thicket! It's practically been hunted to extinction!
Ah, it's true... There used to be so many berries before...

...The hideout's popularity was also because this was a wild strawberry colony. To
monopolize this massive amount of sweetness, the four of us decided to keep this
place hidden from the adults too, but...

\SE[7]\SM[sexhara1]Ugh, ugh~...! B-but, I get hungry when I'm reading... I can't wait until
mealtime.........

And also... I heard from the Village Chief too. Mana's always asking for seconds of
food... So the old lady prepares extra just for Mana's portion, they say!

\SM[double]Waaah~...! But grandma's cooking is so delicious... And she said I could have as many
seconds as I wanted~...

Heh! That's why with that eat-and-sleep lifestyle... Mana... you... your belly's
gotten all soft and pudgy!

\SE[7]Hey, Dario! What are you saying! Telling a girl she's fat or something, that's way
too insensitive!

That's right, Dario...! Mana's in her growth spurt, so it's natural she eats a lot...
It's not good to comment on that... right...?
A-a lot...! \n[1] thought so too...! You thought I was... fat... that I was pudgy...!
N-no! I don't think that!? I've never once thought Mana was fat────

No way! Anyone can see Mana's the chubbiest one here! Just look at that pudgy belly,
anyone would!
I-it's not true! I'm not pudgy! Ugh, waaah~! Dario, you idiot~~~!!
skit pose マナ t child 15
skit pose エリィ t child 5
skit fadeIn エリィ f right
skit fadeIn マナ f left
完了までウェイト = true
完了までウェイト = true

\SE[13]\SM[stamp]Ugh, ~~~!! I-I've decided! I'm going on a diet...! I'll get slim and show
everyone...!

I-I'm not coming to a place like this anymore! And the wild strawberries...
ugh........ I won't eat them anymore either! Waaah~n...!

\SE[10]Mana-chan...!? But... there are still so many wild strawberries left in my pocket...!
No one but Mana-chan could finish this much...!
Huh, Elly? Why do you have so many strawberries stuffed in there...?

\SE[1]'Cause when I feed Mana-chan, she gets super happy... And the way she eats is super
cute too!? When you go 'ahh~' for her, she nibbles it with her little mouth...♡

...That little pot belly might be because Elly fed her too much... No, well, even
after snacking a lot here and going home, she'd still normally eat Grandma's
cooking... Mana's stomach is amazing too...

O-okay... Dario, you eat with us too, okay? This is also your fault for making Mana
angry...? D-Dario?
W-what's wrong? Did Mana hit you somewhere weird?

Ah! N-no, it's nothing...! ...What is this feeling... Could it be that I... about
Mana...♡
完了までウェイト = true

...True to her declaration, Mana started coming along with me for running, both for
dieting and building stamina. And she stopped visiting that hideout...

We also stopped coming to eat wild strawberries, following Mana's lead... And as a
result, we ended up graduating from this place too... It's nostalgic, ahaha...

...Playing together here with everyone is a good memory. Before becoming adults, the
four of us were definitely together here. ...Thinking back like this makes me want to
return to that time...
チャットエンドしたらignore復活する
対象キャラ名 = ダリオ
対象キャラ名 = 村長
完了までウェイト = false
skit pose マナ t child 9
skit pose エリィ t child 8
skit fadeIn エリィ f right 60
skit fadeIn マナ f left 60

H-hey? Are we really going...? If the Village Chief finds out about this, we'll get
in so much trouble...
Heh! What's up, \n[1]...? Don't tell me you're scared of ghosts!? Are you even a man!?

\SE[7]\SM[pop2]Sh-shut up...! Be quiet, you idiot Dario...! What do you think will happen if the
adults find out...!

\SE[13]\SM[tremble]W-waaah~... Going out at this time of night is scary~...! Hey, let's just go
home~...!

W-wait, Mana! If you leave, we'll lose our light source! I'm not letting you go home
alone!
\SE[5]...Uu... Sorry, Mana-chan. You got dragged into our argument...

Heh, this whole thing would be over if you'd just admit it! There's no way ghosts are
in a place like this! The Village Chief is just tricking you guys and having his way
with you!

\SE[3]\SM[double]No way! That's not true! The Village Chief and the others would never trick us! Such
kind, good people wouldn't lie about something like that!
完了までウェイト = true

...This test of courage started with their usual argument. We'd been told by the
Village Chief not to go near the Assembly Hall because ghosts appear there, but Dario
mocked it as a childish fabrication.

But Elly insisted she believed the Village Chief and that ghosts were real. ...None
of us wanted to believe that the foster parents who raised us could be deceiving us.
Mana and I felt the same way.

So the four of us decided to check for ourselves. We came to this Assembly Hall late
at night to prove the kind Village Chief's innocence...
